name: Sharetribe Integration API
tagline: Trusted marketplace data, approvals and audit events
description: Build secure backend or operator tools with Sharetribe's Integration API. Inspect users, listings, and events; approve users; and update permissions using a bearer access token from a trusted application.

auth.hint: Use an access token in the Authorization header from a trusted Sharetribe Integration SDK instance. Keep the client secret server-side and never expose it to browsers or mobile apps.

tools.name: query_users
tools.description: List marketplace users with optional creation-time filtering and sort order.

params.name: createdAtStart
params.description: Return users created on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: createdAtEnd
params.description: Return users created before this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order such as createdAt or -createdAt

tools.name: show_user
tools.description: Look up a specific user by UUID or email address.

params.name: id
params.description: User UUID

params.name: email
params.description: User email address

tools.name: approve_user
tools.description: Approve a user that is currently waiting for operator review.

params.name: id
params.description: User UUID

tools.name: update_user_permissions
tools.description: Allow or deny marketplace permissions for a user.

params.name: id
params.description: User UUID

params.name: postListings
params.description: permission/allow or permission/deny

params.name: initiateTransactions
params.description: permission/allow or permission/deny

params.name: read
params.description: permission/allow or permission/deny

tools.name: query_listings
tools.description: Search all marketplace listings, including closed ones, with optional filters.

params.name: authorId
params.description: Filter listings by author UUID

params.name: states
params.description: Comma-separated listing states such as draft, published, pendingApproval, or closed

params.name: createdAtStart
params.description: Return listings created on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: createdAtEnd
params.description: Return listings created before this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order such as createdAt or -createdAt

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: Create a listing for any marketplace user from a trusted backend app.

params.name: authorId
params.description: Listing author UUID

params.name: title
params.description: Listing title

params.name: state
params.description: Initial state, typically published or pendingApproval

params.name: description
params.description: Listing description

params.name: publicData
params.description: Public extended data for the listing

params.name: metadata
params.description: Public metadata for the listing

params.name: images
params.description: Array of image UUIDs to attach to the listing

tools.name: query_events
tools.description: Stream marketplace audit events and resource changes for trusted backend workflows.

params.name: startAfterSequenceId
params.description: Return events strictly after this sequence ID

params.name: createdAtStart
params.description: Return events created on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: resourceId
params.description: Filter events for a specific resource UUID

params.name: relatedResourceId
params.description: Filter events related to a specific resource UUID

params.name: eventTypes
params.description: Comma-separated event types such as listing/created or message/created
